concerns.analysis: The source document provides specific contact information at the end: an email address (firsttech@nc.gov) and a URL (www.ncbroadband.gov/firsttech/). In the output JSON, element 30 contains the lead-in text and element 32 contains the separator ' and ', but element 31 (which should contain the contact details) is missing entirely from the sequence. Consequently, the output fails to provide the critical contact information present in the source. Under the requirement to check every email and URL
